---
applyTo: "emission-factor-app/src/components/**/*.jsx"
---
# Components Rules

- Components should focus on rendering and interaction wiring.
- Do not fetch data directly inside presentational components.
- Keep props minimal and explicit.
- Use semantic HTML and accessible labels for form controls.
- Keep table and list rendering deterministic and keyed by stable IDs.
- Add defensive empty states when input data can be empty.
